questions.q: CVE-2023-20198 allows an unauthenticated attacker to create a privilege-15 account on Cisco IOS XE by sending a crafted HTTP request to the Web UI.
What CVSS score did CVE-2023-20198 receive, reflecting the maximum possible severity?
options: A) CVSS 9.8 — Critical but authentication is required
B) CVSS 10.0 — no authentication, no user interaction, complete compromise

questions.q: Privilege level 15 in Cisco IOS is equivalent to a read-only observer role with no ability to change device configuration.
Which command correctly disables the IOS XE HTTP management interface to remediate the CVE-2023-20198 attack surface?
options: A) no ip http server  /  no ip http secure-server
B) ip http access-class deny any

questions.q: By the time Cisco published its first advisory on October 16, 2023, over 50,000 IOS XE devices had already been implanted.
The ArcaneDoor campaign targeted Cisco ASA and FTD devices — the very perimeter security appliances designed to protect networks from external threats.
Which malware family in the ArcaneDoor campaign provided persistent access that survived device reboots and software upgrades?
options: A) Line Runner — installed as a malicious ASDM plugin in the plugin directory
B) Line Dancer — an in-memory shellcode implant that reloads on boot

questions.q: Line Dancer, the ArcaneDoor in-memory implant, is easily detected using standard IOS XE log analysis and the 'show users' command.
What IOS XE inspection technique most reliably detects a Line Runner plugin implant after a suspected ArcaneDoor compromise?
options: A) show ip route — malicious routes indicate implant activity
B) dir disk0:*.zip — unexpected ZIP archives in the plugin directory are the implant indicator

questions.q: The ArcaneDoor threat actor (UAT4356 / STORM-1849) was attributed to a nation-state with advanced zero-day development capability.
CVE-2018-0171 exploits the Cisco Smart Install protocol on TCP port 4786 and requires valid credentials to trigger the buffer overflow.
Which U.S. government agencies issued a joint alert attributing mass CVE-2018-0171 exploitation to Russian state actor APT28 (GRU)?
options: A) FBI and CISA, in joint Technical Alert TA18-106A
B) NSA and Cyber Command, in a classified advisory

questions.q: Smart Install Client is enabled by default on many Cisco IOS and IOS XE devices, even when the device is not being used for zero-touch provisioning.
What is the correct IOS command to disable the Smart Install Client and eliminate the CVE-2018-0171 attack surface?
options: B) ip tcp intercept list BLOCK-SMI

questions.q: At peak exposure, security researchers identified over 250,000 devices with TCP port 4786 accessible from the internet.
